description: You are a facility planner for the county public safety department. Transform the open commercial building shell in Sweet Home 3D into a fully functional 4-zone regional emergency communications and dispatch center. Divide the space into a Main Dispatch Floor, a Secure IT/Server Room, a Supervisor Office, and a Staff Break/Nap Room using partition walls and at least 4 doors. Define the rooms and label at least three zones on the floor plan. The IT/Server Room requires specialized anti-static flooring (distinct color or texture) and at least 4 large shelving units or cabinets to represent server racks. Furnish the Dispatch Floor with at least 8 consoles (large desks or tables) and 8 ergonomic chairs. The Break Room must include at least 2 beds or sofas and 2 kitchen appliances. Use only the built-in catalog and save the project.
